name: All Compose Scenarios
description: All Copilot Compose scenarios across ALL apps and clients. No aid= filter (All Areas) to avoid missing cross-app scenarios like ComposeHandoff (BizChat) or Vibe Writing (Chat). FeatureNames validated against ocv_feedback_query_reference.md on 2026-03-27.

_query_notes.aid: REMOVED — previously aid=147 (Outlook only) which missed BizChat/Chat scenarios. Now searches All Areas.

featureNames_native_clients.Rewrite: Win32 only (iOS/Android/Mac use Elaborate featureArea for H&R)

featureNames_owa_monarch.Copilot_ComposeHandoff: OWA (only client with handoff OCV feedback)

featureNames_chat_vibe.Copilot_Chat_Mail: iOS (aid=2814), Android (aid=2813) — vibe writing via Chat
featureNames_chat_vibe.M365 Chat: Mac — vibe writing via Chat module

removed_unconfirmed.VibeWriting: Telemetry scenario name, NOT an OCV featureArea value
removed_unconfirmed.CoAuthoring: Telemetry scenario name, NOT an OCV featureArea value
removed_unconfirmed.RewriteSydney: Not in reference doc featureArea table (OWA uses Copilot_RewriteSydney)
removed_unconfirmed.Suggested Replies: iOS uses email shaker, Android uses 'Suggested Drafts', no standalone featureArea

_query_notes.known_gaps: Mac only sends ThumbsDown. H&R shares Elaborate featureArea on iOS/Android/Mac (inseparable). iOS Suggested Replies uses email shaker (SRFeedback@service.microsoft.com), not OCV.

Tone - Too Formal.description: Output is too formal, wordy, verbose, or doesn't sound natural

Wrong Language.description: Output in wrong language or translation failure

Ignores Instructions.description: Copilot ignores user prompts or refinement instructions

Context Failure.description: Doesn't understand the email thread or misses intent

Not Working.description: Generic failures, errors, crashes, no output

Meaning Changed.description: Output altered the meaning or intent of the original text

Too Different.description: Rewrite/edit changes too much — user wanted minor edits

Unhelpful Suggestions.description: Coach suggestions are obvious, generic, or not actionable

Quality - Generic Output.description: Output is too generic, template-like, or doesn't match user's writing style

Em Dashes & Formatting.description: Em dash overuse, HTML artifacts, formatting issues

Pronoun Override.description: Copilot overrides gendered pronouns with they/their

Handoff Failure.description: ComposeHandoff didn't open Outlook, link broken, draft not populated
